name: مستندات تم مراجعتها لكل منظور 2
query:
SELECT  digital_transformation_officer ' الموظف المسؤول',sum(completed_count) 'مستندات مكتمله ' , sum(proof_count) ' اجمالي المستندات المطلوبة' ,round(sum(completed_count)/sum(proof_count),2)*100 'النسبة'
FROM
  `tabElements-2024`
  group by digital_transformation_officer
LIMIT
  1048575
report_script:
sql = "select vision,sum(reviewed_count) as proof_completed_sum, sum(proof_count) as proof_count_sum ,  truncate(sum(reviewed_count)/sum(proof_count),2)*100 as reviewed_percent  from `tabElements-2024`  group by Vision "
data1 = frappe.db.sql(sql , as_dict = 1)


columns=[	{
		"fieldname": "vision",
		"fieldtype": "Link",
		"label": _("منظور"),
		"options":"Vision",
		"width": 300
		},
		{
			"fieldname": "proof_completed_sum",
			"fieldtype": "Int",
			"label": _('مستندات مكتملة '),
			"width": 200

		},
		{
			"fieldname": "proof_count_sum",
			"fieldtype": "Int",
			"label": _( 'اجمالي المستندات المطلوبة'),
			"width": 200

		},
		{
			"fieldname": "reviewed_percent",
			"fieldtype": "Percent",
			"label": _( 'النسبه'),
			"width": 200

		},
		]


	
labels =[]
values1 = []
values2 = []
values3 = []

for entry in data1:
		labels.append(entry["vision"])
		values1.append(entry["proof_completed_sum"])
		values2.append(entry["proof_count_sum"])
		values3.append(entry["reviewed_percent"])


chart = {'data':{'labels':labels,'datasets':[{ 'name':'مستندات مكتملة', 'values':values1} ,{'name':'اجمالي المستندات المطلوبه','values':values2} , {'name': 'النسبه','values':values3} ]},'type':'bar'}
title="test"

report_summary = []
    
for entry in data1:
        vision_label = entry["vision"]
        proof_completed_sum = entry["proof_completed_sum"]
        proof_count_sum = entry["proof_count_sum"] 
        reviewed_percent = entry["reviewed_percent"]

        
        dict = {"label": vision_label, "value": [proof_completed_sum ,proof_count_sum  , reviewed_percent] , "indicator" : "blue"}
        
        report_summary.append(dict)

summary = report_summary

title = " مستندات تم مراجعتها لكل منظور"
data=columns,data1,title,chart,summary
